name: fathom
description: Read meetings, transcripts, summaries, and teams from the Fathom AI notetaker

envVars.name: FATHOM_API_KEY
envVars.description: Fathom external API key (generated in Fathom settings)

tools.name: List Meetings
tools.description: List recorded meetings, optionally including summaries and action items

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from next_cursor in a previous response

created_after.description: Only meetings created after this ISO 8601 timestamp

created_before.description: Only meetings created before this ISO 8601 timestamp

include_summary.description: Include the AI summary for each meeting

include_action_items.description: Include action items for each meeting

historicalSummary.omitted: transcripts, summaries, action items, and CRM matches

tools.name: Get Transcript
tools.description: Get the transcript of a recording

tools.name: Get Summary
tools.description: Get the AI summary of a recording

tools.name: List Teams
tools.description: List teams in the Fathom workspace

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from next_cursor in a previous response

tools.name: List Team Members
tools.description: List team members in the Fathom workspace

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from next_cursor in a previous response

prompts.title: Recent meetings
prompts.prompt: List my Fathom meetings from the last week with their summaries and action items.

prompts.title: Meeting recap
prompts.prompt: Get the transcript and summary of my latest Fathom meeting and draft a follow-up email.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Fathom API Setup

steps.title: Sign in to Fathom
steps.description: Go to https://fathom.video and sign in. This is the Fathom AI meeting notetaker (not Fathom Analytics). Record at least one test meeting so data exists.

steps.title: Generate an API key
steps.description: Open Fathom Settings → API and generate an API key. API access may require a paid team plan.

steps.title: Set the environment variable
steps.description: Add the key to your .env as FATHOM_API_KEY=...

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run List Teams or List Meetings to confirm the key works.

notes: Fathom authenticates with an 'X-Api-Key' request header
Rate limit is 60 requests per 60-second window
Transcript and summary endpoints can also deliver asynchronously to a destination_url; these tools fetch the data directly
